overview: Paradox.ai is an advanced multi-mode AI assistant with 5 operational modes — Text, Image, Video, Music, and Analytics. It features smart prompt templates, multi-model reasoning styles, query history, and a futuristic UI.
features: 5 AI modes: Text, Image, Video, Music, Analytics
Multi-Model Reasoning Styles: Creative, Analytical, Technical
Mocked AI responses with structured output
Query history with search and persistence
Settings panel with export and clear history
